Home → Discography → Destination Ailleurs

Destination Ailleurs

2010 · L2K Calidad

A French collaboration album between Bizzy Bone and French rapper Papillon Bandana, released before Crossroads: 2010. One of the most unique entries in Bizzy's catalog — a transatlantic project blending American rapid-fire hip hop with French urban music. Features Layzie Bone, Fingazz and Big Sloan. Rated 3.09 out of 5 on Rate Your Music with 33 ratings.

"I want you to fill your gas tanks up, halfway empty, halfway full."

— Very Bad Trip
01 Intro produced by Makavelik ▷
02 So High (Lève ton verre en l'air) produced by Makavelik ▷
03 Destination Ailleurs produced by Makaveliks ▷
04 Summertime Melody produced by Fingazz feat. Fingazz ▷
05 Besoin de personne produced by Makavelik ▷
06 Témoignages produced by Makavelik ▷
07 Attiré par la lumière produced by Makavelik ▷
08 Questions difficiles produced by Venom feat. Layzie Bone & Big Sloan ▷
09 Once Again produced by Makavelik feat. Rma2y ▷
10 All Day Everyday produced by Makavelik feat. Le Fou ▷
11 Very Bad Trip produced by Makavelik feat. Duardo Vagabundo ▷
12 Un autre monde (My World) produced by Makavelik feat. dj ak ▷
13 Outro produced by Makavelik ▷
14 Destination Ailleurs (Aller simple Remix) produced by Ghetto Twinz Beatz feat. Raja ▷
